records.question: What catalog structures include Diet Pepsi entries with a length of exactly 8 and height of exactly 3, belong to the Chocolate catalog revised on 2017-09-26 12:10:36, and have additional attributes where the value is 0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT catalog_structure.catalog_id FROM catalog_structure
JOIN catalogs ON catalog_structure.catalog_id = catalogs.catalog_id
JOIN catalog_contents ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents.catalog_level_number
JOIN catalog_contents_additional_attributes ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents_additional_attributes.catalog_level_number
WHERE catalog_contents.length = '8' AND catalogs.catalog_name = 'Chocolate' AND catalog_contents.catalog_entry_name = 'Diet Pepsi' AND catalog_contents.height = '3' AND catalogs.date_of_latest_revision = '2017-09-26 12:10:36' AND catalog_contents_additional_attributes.attribute_value = '0'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT cs.catalog_id
FROM Catalog_Structure cs
JOIN Catalog_Contents cc ON cs.catalog_level_number = cc.catalog_level_number
JOIN Catalogs c ON cs.catalog_id = c.catalog_id
JOIN Catalog_Contents_Additional_Attributes caa ON cc.catalog_entry_id = caa.catalog_entry_id AND cs.catalog_level_number = caa.catalog_level_number
WHERE cc.catalog_entry_name = 'Diet Pepsi'
  AND cc.length = '8'
  AND cc.height = '3'
  AND c.catalog_name = 'Chocolate'
  AND c.date_of_latest_revision = '2017-09-26 12:10:36'
  AND caa.attribute_value = '0'

records.question: Which catalog structure entries at the Category level include a product named Tizer priced exactly at 331.43 pounds?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT catalog_structure.catalog_id FROM catalog_structure
JOIN catalogs ON catalog_structure.catalog_id = catalogs.catalog_id
JOIN catalog_contents ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents.catalog_level_number
JOIN catalog_contents_additional_attributes ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents_additional_attributes.catalog_level_number
WHERE catalog_contents.catalog_entry_name = 'Tizer' AND catalog_contents.price_in_pounds = 331.43 AND catalog_structure.catalog_level_name = 'Category'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT cs.catalog_id
FROM Catalog_Structure cs
JOIN Catalog_Contents cc ON cs.catalog_level_number = cc.catalog_level_number
WHERE cs.catalog_level_name = 'Category'
  AND cc.catalog_entry_name = 'Tizer'
  AND cc.price_in_pounds = 331.43

records.question: Which catalog structures have a catalog_level_name exactly Sub-Category and belong to catalogs revised on or after 2017-10-26 01:16:51?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT catalog_structure.catalog_id FROM catalog_structure
JOIN catalogs ON catalog_structure.catalog_id = catalogs.catalog_id
WHERE catalogs.date_of_latest_revision >= '2017-10-26 01:16:51' AND catalog_structure.catalog_level_name = 'Sub-Category'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Catalog_Structure.catalog_id
FROM Catalog_Structure
JOIN Catalogs ON Catalog_Structure.catalog_id = Catalogs.catalog_id
WHERE Catalog_Structure.catalog_level_name = 'Sub-Category'
  AND Catalogs.date_of_latest_revision >= '2017-10-26 01:16:51'

records.question: Which catalog entries are exactly at the Category level?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT catalog_structure.catalog_id FROM catalog_structure
WHERE catalog_structure.catalog_level_name = 'Category'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Catalog_Structure.catalog_id
FROM Catalog_Contents
JOIN Catalog_Structure ON Catalog_Contents.catalog_level_number = Catalog_Structure.catalog_level_number
WHERE Catalog_Structure.catalog_level_name = 'Category'

records.question: What catalog structures include product stock number 61 py and have an additional attribute with value 1?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT catalog_structure.catalog_id FROM catalog_structure
JOIN catalog_contents ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents.catalog_level_number
JOIN catalog_contents_additional_attributes ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents_additional_attributes.catalog_level_number
WHERE catalog_contents.product_stock_number = '61 py' AND catalog_contents_additional_attributes.attribute_value = '1'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT cs.catalog_id
FROM Catalog_Contents cc
JOIN Catalog_Contents_Additional_Attributes caa ON cc.catalog_entry_id = caa.catalog_entry_id AND cc.catalog_level_number = caa.catalog_level_number
JOIN Catalog_Structure cs ON cc.catalog_level_number = cs.catalog_level_number
WHERE cc.product_stock_number = '61 py' AND caa.attribute_value = '1'

records.question: What products are included in the catalog structure?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT catalog_structure.catalog_id FROM catalog_structure
WHERE catalog_structure.catalog_level_name = 'Product'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT catalog_level_number.catalog_id
FROM Catalog_Structure AS catalog_level_number
JOIN Catalog_Contents AS contents ON catalog_level_number.catalog_level_number = contents.catalog_level_number

records.question: Which catalog structure entries are for products in the Jam catalog published by Grady & Kautzer, with publication dates on or after 2011-07-22 04:57:19 and latest revisions on or before 2017-03-30 09:15:37?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT catalog_structure.catalog_id FROM catalog_structure
JOIN catalogs ON catalog_structure.catalog_id = catalogs.catalog_id
WHERE catalogs.catalog_publisher = 'Grady & Kautzer' AND catalog_structure.catalog_level_name = 'Product' AND catalogs.date_of_publication >= '2011-07-22 04:57:19' AND catalogs.date_of_latest_revision <= '2017-03-30 09:15:37' AND catalogs.catalog_name = 'Jam'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Catalog_Structure.catalog_id
FROM Catalog_Structure
JOIN Catalogs ON Catalog_Structure.catalog_id = Catalogs.catalog_id
WHERE Catalogs.catalog_name = 'Jam'
  AND Catalogs.catalog_publisher = 'Grady & Kautzer'
  AND Catalogs.date_of_publication >= '2011-07-22 04:57:19'
  AND Catalogs.date_of_latest_revision <= '2017-03-30 09:15:37'

records.question: What catalog structure entries at the Category level are linked to Mountain Dew items with length exactly 8, width exactly 5, and a price in euros at most 457.4?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT catalog_structure.catalog_id FROM catalog_structure
JOIN catalog_contents ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents.catalog_level_number
JOIN catalog_contents_additional_attributes ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents_additional_attributes.catalog_level_number
WHERE catalog_contents.length = '8' AND catalog_contents.catalog_entry_name = 'Mountain Dew' AND catalog_structure.catalog_level_name = 'Category' AND catalog_contents.width = '5' AND catalog_contents.price_in_euros <= 457.4
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT cs.catalog_id
FROM Catalog_Structure cs
JOIN Catalog_Contents cc ON cs.catalog_level_number = cc.catalog_level_number
WHERE cs.catalog_level_name = 'Category'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Catalog_Contents cc2
    WHERE cc2.product_stock_number = cc.product_stock_number
      AND cc2.catalog_level_number = cc.catalog_level_number
      AND cc2.catalog_entry_name LIKE '%Mountain Dew%'
      AND cc2.length = '8'
      AND cc2.width = '5'
      AND cc2.price_in_euros <= 457.4
  )

records.question: Which catalog entries have a height of 7, width of 8, and length of 9, come from product stock number 52 ee, have an attribute value of 0, and cost at least 360.5 dollars?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT catalog_structure.catalog_id FROM catalog_structure
JOIN catalog_contents ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents.catalog_level_number
JOIN catalog_contents_additional_attributes ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents_additional_attributes.catalog_level_number
WHERE catalog_contents.height = '7' AND catalog_contents_additional_attributes.attribute_value = '0' AND catalog_contents.width = '8' AND catalog_contents.length = '9' AND catalog_contents.price_in_dollars >= 360.5 AND catalog_contents.product_stock_number = '52 ee'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT cs.catalog_id
FROM Catalog_Contents cc
JOIN Catalog_Structure cs ON cc.catalog_level_number = cs.catalog_level_number
JOIN Catalog_Contents_Additional_Attributes cca ON cc.catalog_entry_id = cca.catalog_entry_id AND cc.catalog_level_number = cca.catalog_level_number
WHERE cc.height = '7'
  AND cc.width = '8'
  AND cc.length = '9'
  AND cc.product_stock_number = '52 ee'
  AND cca.attribute_value = '0'
  AND cc.price_in_dollars >= 360.5

records.question: Which sub-categories include Root beer in their catalog contents?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT catalog_structure.catalog_id FROM catalog_structure
JOIN catalogs ON catalog_structure.catalog_id = catalogs.catalog_id
JOIN catalog_contents ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents.catalog_level_number
JOIN catalog_contents_additional_attributes ON catalog_structure.catalog_level_number = catalog_contents_additional_attributes.catalog_level_number
WHERE catalog_structure.catalog_level_name = 'Sub-Category' AND catalog_contents.catalog_entry_name = 'Root beer'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT cs.catalog_id
FROM Catalog_Contents cc
JOIN Catalog_Structure cs ON cc.catalog_level_number = cs.catalog_level_number
WHERE cc.catalog_entry_name = 'Root beer'
